title: mentha × carinthiaca var. triemarginata
intro: Mentha × carinthiaca var. triemarginata, also known as Pineapple Mint, is a variety of the Carinthian mint, a hybrid species of mint native to the European Alps. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pineapple Mint include its ability to ease digestion, reduce nausea, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Pineapple Mint can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and relieve respiratory discomfort.
